creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Because I stumbled into the same problem describe here

http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-current/2012-February/031987.html

I made a patch to get the right path for lang/gcc into the vigra libs. 
Before that there had been wrong pathes for libstdc++.so.6 and 
libgcc_s.so.1:

#ldd /usr/local/lib/libvigraimpex.so.4
/usr/local/lib/libvigraimpex.so.4:
         libjpeg.so.11 => /usr/local/lib/libjpeg.so.11 (0x2ce87000)
         libpng.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libpng.so.6 (0x2d0be000)
         libz.so.6 => /lib/libz.so.6 (0x2d2e8000)
         libtiff.so.4 => /usr/local/lib/libtiff.so.4 (0x2d4fe000)
         libHalf.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libHalf.so.6 (0x2d76d000)
         libIex.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libIex.so.6 (0x2d9af000)
         libIlmThread.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libIlmThread.so.6 (0x2dbc6000)
         libImath.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libImath.so.6 (0x2ddcd000)
         libIlmImf.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libIlmImf.so.6 (0x2dfd2000)
         libhdf5.so.7 => /usr/local/lib/libhdf5.so.7 (0x2e297000)
         libhdf5_hl.so.7 => /usr/local/lib/libhdf5_hl.so.7 (0x2e724000)
         libstdc++.so.6 => /usr/lib/libstdc++.so.6 (0x2e952000)
         libm.so.5 => /lib/libm.so.5 (0x2ec64000)
         libgcc_s.so.1 => /lib/libgcc_s.so.1 (0x2ee87000)
         libc.so.7 => /lib/libc.so.7 (0x2c451000)
         liblzma.so.5 => /usr/lib/liblzma.so.5 (0x2f094000)
         libjbig.so.1 => /usr/local/lib/libjbig.so.1 (0x2f2b7000)
         libthr.so.3 => /lib/libthr.so.3 (0x2f4c4000)


With the patch for CMakeLists.txt we get the right ones:

#ldd /usr/local/lib/libvigraimpex.so.4
/usr/local/lib/libvigraimpex.so.4:
         libjpeg.so.11 => /usr/local/lib/libjpeg.so.11 (0x41287000)
         libpng.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libpng.so.6 (0x414be000)
         libz.so.6 => /lib/libz.so.6 (0x416e8000)
         libtiff.so.4 => /usr/local/lib/libtiff.so.4 (0x418fe000)
         libHalf.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libHalf.so.6 (0x41b6d000)
         libIex.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libIex.so.6 (0x41daf000)
         libIlmThread.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libIlmThread.so.6 (0x41fc6000)
         libImath.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libImath.so.6 (0x421cd000)
         libIlmImf.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libIlmImf.so.6 (0x423d2000)
         libhdf5.so.7 => /usr/local/lib/libhdf5.so.7 (0x42697000)
         libhdf5_hl.so.7 => /usr/local/lib/libhdf5_hl.so.7 (0x42b24000)
         libstdc++.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/gcc46/libstdc++.so.6 (0x42d52000)
         libm.so.5 => /lib/libm.so.5 (0x43055000)
         libgcc_s.so.1 => /usr/local/lib/gcc46/libgcc_s.so.1 (0x43278000)
         libc.so.7 => /lib/libc.so.7 (0x40851000)
         liblzma.so.5 => /usr/lib/liblzma.so.5 (0x4348d000)
         libjbig.so.1 => /usr/local/lib/libjbig.so.1 (0x436b0000)
         libthr.so.3 => /lib/libthr.so.3 (0x438bd000)


While I was here I also made a bit more cleanup and I decided to 
integrate textproc/py-sphinx for building the documention.
